calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment Per Ccp 473(B)(D), And Motion To Dismiss; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Carol R. Hamilton
Off Calendar Aug-28-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS L.A. COMMERICIAL GROUP, INC., DBA CONTINENTAL COMEERCIAL GROUP's Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment Per Ccp 473(B)(D), And Motion To Dismiss.

The unopposed motion to vacate default and default judgment is granted.

Proposed order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

/ Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment Per Ccp 473(B) (D) , And Motion To Dismiss; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Carol R. Hamilton; {Proposed) Order
Off Calendar Jun-18-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Counsel for parties were ordered to appear for hearing. No appearances were made.

PLAINTIFF L.A. COMMERICIAL GROUP, INC. A CORPORATION, DBA CONTINENTAL COMEERCIAL GROUP's Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment Per Ccp 473(B) (D), And Motion To Dismiss is DENIED without prejudice to its renewal for the following reasons:

Counsel's Declaration in support of her motion is defective in that it appears to refer to the facts in another case and, accordingly, provides no support for the Motion before the Court. In its Tentative Ruling, the Court ordered counsel to appear so as to clarify her Declaration. Counsel failed to appear. Consideration will be given to a renewed motion supported by an appropriate declaration.

Court to prepare order.

Visiting Judge: John True; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/JT)
